summary: Full backend + frontend e2e test of redesigned Blayake landing page (iteration 2 — pill nav, glass cards, custom cursor, optional phone+message lead schema). Backend: 7/7 pytest cases pass. Frontend: every required data-testid renders, FAQ behaves correctly, custom cursor mounts on desktop and scales on hover (matrix 1.8x verified), contact form end-to-end with phone field successfully creates lead in MongoDB and shows success status.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend LeadCreate still accepts company/project_type fields though frontend no longer sends them. Not a bug, but consider removing from model+DB or documenting why retained for back-compat.

Lead model uses EmailStr but stores email as plain string after model_dump — fine; just note ordering by created_at uses ISO-8601 string sort (works because timezone is uniform UTC). If non-UTC writes are ever introduced, sort order could break.
frontend Blayake.jsx is ~480 lines but still single file with 6 subcomponents — within the 700-line guideline; acceptable. Could be split into /pages/Blayake/sections/* if it grows.
Cursor.jsx pageerror on initial mouseenter is swallowed by setEnabled gating — clean. mix-blend-difference cursor is intentional.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed leads in MongoDB during pytest + one TEST_e2e_<ts> lead from playwright form submission. All test rows use TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_blayake_api.py covers health + leads schema (phone/message both optional, company/project_type still allowed). Frontend uses Lenis smooth scroll which can interfere with element.scrollIntoView — use page.evaluate('window.scrollTo' / element.scrollIntoView) and wait_for_timeout(800). Custom cursor only mounts when (pointer:fine) — playwright chromium desktop satisfies this; cursor-dot/ring testids are real DOM nodes. scroll-progress element has scaleX(0) at top of page so playwright is_visible() returns False even though it exists — verify via DOM query/computed transform instead. Form success message text 'GOT IT. WE'LL BE IN TOUCH WITHIN 24 HOURS.' (uppercased by CSS). E2E lead creation confirmed end-to-end: frontend submit → POST /api/leads → Mongo → GET /api/leads returns the lead with phone field intact.
